alpha.desc: The alpha view shows the front of the residence and the paved area adjacent to the tennis court|The curved driveway provides access to the home, while mature trees partially screen portions of the structure|Lawn areas and landscaped walkways are visible around the residence.

bravo.desc: The bravo view shows the eastern side of the residence|Two detached structures are visible beyond the home, connected by a driveway or access route|Trees and native vegetation surround the developed areas, with landscaped grounds adjacent to the residence.

charlie.desc: The charlie view shows the rear portion of the residence|A landscaped lawn, pathways, and a covered outdoor structure are visible behind the home.

delta.desc: The delta view shows the western side of the residence and highlights the relationship between the home, tennis court, driveway, and surrounding vegetation|The residence is situated within a clearing, with mature trees distributed throughout the parcel and neighboring properties.

nadir.desc: The nadir view shows a large residence situated near the center of a wooded parcel|A curved driveway connects the home to the roadway on the west side of the property|A tennis court is located south of the residence, while landscaped lawn areas, pathways, and two detached structures are visible around the home|Mature trees and native vegetation surround the property.
